description: 用于月份/年份/季节/一天中的部分。in March / in 2024。
用于星期/具体日期/节日前。on Monday / on June 5th。
examples_json: [{"en":"The party is on Friday.","zh":"聚会在周五。"}]

description: 用于钟表时间/年龄/特定时期。at 5pm / at night。
examples_json: [{"en":"The meeting starts at 9 AM.","zh":"会议在上午9点开始。"}]

description: 表示主句动作发生在从句之前。
examples_json: [{"en":"Before I go to bed I read for 30 minutes.","zh":"睡觉前我会读30分钟书。"}]

description: 表示主句动作发生在从句之后。
examples_json: [{"en":"After I finished work I went to the gym.","zh":"我下班后去了健身房。"}]

description: 表示两个动作同时发生。常与进行时连用。
examples_json: [{"en":"While I was cooking he was watching TV.","zh":"我做饭时他在看电视。"}]

description: 在空间/区域内部。in the room / in the city。
examples_json: [{"en":"The milk is in the fridge.","zh":"牛奶在冰箱里。"}]

description: 在表面。on the table / on the wall / on the floor。
examples_json: [{"en":"The book is on the desk.","zh":"书在书桌上。"}]
[{"en":"The bank is next to the post office.","zh":"银行在邮局旁边。"}]
[{"en":"Go straight until you reach the traffic lights.","zh":"直走直到你看到红绿灯。"}]

description: 向左转弯。turn right = 右转。
examples_json: [{"en":"Turn left at the next corner.","zh":"在下一个路口左转。"}]
[{"en":"The café is opposite the cinema.","zh":"咖啡馆在电影院对面。"}]
